title: unable to do cross-compilation (arm64 build within amd64 machine)
body:
hello, it looks like this podman machine is not allowing to do arm64 builds using amd64 machine

See https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/19961

it might require an extra configuration in addition to the installation of `qemu-user-static` package done there https://github.com/containers/podman-machine-wsl-os/blob/main/.cirrus.yml#L9

comments.body: I close this as dup of #19961
